_comment: Email routing for SES→Lambda. Keys = recipient address (lowercase), values = agent slug (the agent's dir under team/agents/ and the 'agent' field the SQS poller routes on). Edit this file and upload to s3://email-hazerem-fwd/config/agent-routes.json — the lambda reads it at runtime, no redeploy needed. Addresses matching the tester pattern (tester*@roikedem.com) are handled by the lambda separately and need no entry here. Anything not listed is forwarded to Roi's Gmail.
